title: Glossy Black Side Door Handle Covers & Mirror Trims For Dodge Durango 2011-2020
bullets: Complete exterior trim set includes side door handle covers and mirror cover trims for left and right sides of the vehicle
Premium glossy black finish over high-quality ABS plastic with UV-resistant clear coat prevents fading, oxidation, and peeling
Precision-molded to snap directly over factory handles and mirror housings with 3M automotive adhesive tape pre-installed
No drilling, cutting, or permanent modification required — installs in minutes with simple peel-and-stick application for an instant custom look
Protects original factory paint and chrome from scratches, chips, and daily wear while adding a sleek blacked-out appearance
Custom-fit for 2011-2020 Dodge Durango — each piece is contoured to match the exact curvature of factory body components
